summary: Terms of Service page successfully implements the diner aesthetic with proper teal background, cream card surface, effective date display, and all required legal sections. Minor typography weight deviation noted but does not block core functionality.

violations.description: Primary heading 'Terms of Service' appears to use bold weight instead of the required black weight (font-black, 900) specified for primary public headings

actions: Verify heading font-weight is set to 900/font-black for 'Terms of Service' title
Confirm all section headings follow the typography hierarchy defined in the manifesto
